title: Sonaural
excerpt: An immersive site-specific AV performance with Skander Jaïbi — from drone to brutalist intensity.
description: An immersive, site-specific audiovisual performance — a personal project with Skander Jaïbi. Combining modular synthesizers, projectors, TouchDesigner, local satellite data and 3D scanning, the piece begins as a drone and soon develops into a brutalist, intense experience.
